---
title: "Jacob Johnson"
description-meta: "Personal Academic Website for Jacob Johnson"
image: "files/images/JacobJohnson.JPG"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
sidebar: true
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dbN-_3QAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:jajohnsonstats@gmail.com   
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub 
      href: https://github.com/jajohnsonstats
      target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-johnson-179391251
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0002-3797-0812
      target: _blank
    - icon: sun
      text: Katzfuss Group
      href: https://sites.google.com/view/katzfuss/group
      target: _blank
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I'm a second year PhD student at the [University of Wisconsin–Madison](https://stat.wisc.edu/) working with [Dr. Matthias Katzfuß](https://sites.google.com/view/katzfuss/home). I am also a year-round statistics intern at [Sandia National Laboratories](https://www.sandia.gov/) working with [Katherine Goode](https://goodekat.github.io/).  
My research is focused on finding new methods in Spatial Statistics, Gaussian Processes, and Uncertainty Quantification, specifically with applications in climate and environmental science.

You can find my publications on my [CV](files/CV/JacobJohnsonCV.pdf) or [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dbN-_3QAAAAJ&hl=en) profile. 

:::
